what_was_built: reports/portfolio_capital_efficiency_input_contract_v1/input_contract.json (machine-readable P1 input contract: admissible frozen input classes, required fields, admissibility + freeze rules, verdict ceiling, C10 deferral)
tests/test_portfolio_capital_efficiency_input_contract.py (24 tests covering schema + safety + C10 deferral + validator failure modes + P0 companion)

framework_only_record.note: P1 defines the portfolio input framework only. No concrete candidate output (C10 or otherwise) is connected, read, or evaluated.

c10_deferral_record.blocked_until: Candidate #10 finishes and freezes by itself first (its own lane produces a committed, checksummed replay/verdict artifact).
c10_deferral_record.when_admissible: Once C10 has a FROZEN, committed replay output, it becomes an ordinary read-only bench input under the same admissibility_rules -- usable to evaluate overlap, correlation, and capital efficiency. Frozen committed form only; never the working tree.
c10_deferral_record.c10_working_tree_state: untouched (pre-existing M on tools/c10_real_candle_detection_once.py and tests/test_c10_real_candle_detection_once_runner_purity.py left exactly as found)

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: No allocation is authorized by this contract alone.
Candidate #10 frozen replay outputs are a deferred future input and are not connected by this contract.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.

registry_integration.note: Shared tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py intentionally NOT modified (additive-only / surgical). Lane self-declares WATCH inside its own contract.json.

recommended_next_bundle: Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Metric Spec v1 (P2) -- pin exact formulas + inputs per metric; spec only, nothing computed
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Allocation Baseline Spec v1 (P3) -- reference models + concentration cap; spec only
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Overlap/Correlation Method v1 (P4) -- redundancy estimation method; spec only
no_profit_claim: This contract does not imply edge and does not allocate capital.
Clean, frozen inputs do not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
No allocation is authorized by this contract alone.
